pr_text:
## Title: Fix signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch in pipe I/O functions

### Summary
Correct type mismatches in the `write_pipe()` and `read_pipe()` helper functions to align with POSIX specifications for the `write()` and `read()` system calls. The functions previously used signed `int` types for both the buffer size parameter and return value, while the underlying system calls expect `size_t` (unsigned) for the count parameter and return `ssize_t` (signed). This mismatch could trigger
